title: Radical Rick 2025 New Year’s Drawing — Original 1 of 1
source_title: Radical Rick 2025 New Years Drawing Original 1 of 1
alt: Signed black, white and red drawing of Radical Rick jumping over a kneeling figure marked 2024 while a baby marked 2025 reacts nearby.
summary: This original Radical Rick New Year’s 2025 drawing was created by BMX artist Damian Fulton, whose Radical Rick comic strip helped define the visual culture of BMX during the 1980s. Fulton traditionally creates a special illustration each year celebrating the arrival of the new year, featuring Radical Rick launching into the future with his signature BMX energy. This hand-signed piece is drawn in Fulton’s classic style and represents the continued legacy of Radical Rick within BMX art and culture.
provenance: Source recorded as Damian Fulton in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claims: The annual-tradition description is sourced from the inventory record.
details: Original drawing created for New Year 2025.
The imagery marks the transition from 2024 to 2025.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
